idea-plugin.name: Compose Preview Gallery
idea-plugin.description:
Compose Preview Gallery gives you a project-wide, searchable browser for Jetpack Compose @Preview functions.

Android Studio only shows previews for the file currently open in the editor. In a large multi-module codebase there is no way to answer "what components do we have?" without knowing the file path in advance. This plugin indexes every preview in the project and lets you find it by name.
